8Cr13MoV Rosewood Eel Knife 175 mm

This premium eel fillet knife (unagisaki) is crafted for wholesale buyers seeking a specialized tool for high-volume eel preparation. The 175 mm blade is forged from 8Cr13MoV stainless steel, a material known for its superior hardness and ability to hold a sharp edge through repetitive use. This steel resists staining and corrosion, ensuring longevity in busy commercial kitchens or retail settings where durability is paramount. The traditional Japanese unagisaki profile features a thin, pointed blade that allows for precise, clean cuts through eel skin and bones without tearing the delicate flesh. Whether you are a distributor supplying Japanese restaurants or a kitchen supply store catering to seafood specialists, this knife meets the demands of professional eel processing.

The handle is crafted from select rosewood, chosen for its natural moisture resistance and comfortable feel. Its ergonomic shape reduces hand fatigue during extended use, making it ideal for bulk eel preparation.
